title: Can't load file from input file after updating from 3.5 to 3.7
author: jeremy-saidani

comments.author: anterta
jjhbw
TomaszG
comments.body:
Any chances to get it fixed? Maybe someone has a workaround?

@jeremy-saidani the last version without this bug is 3.6.1, you may want to fix your package.json to stick with that version.

After a short investigation, it seems that here lies the source of the issue:
[diff](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/compare/v3.6.1...v3.7.0#diff-147b472da81752bafc2b02627836b12e)

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
thank you @TomaszG for an investigation it will be really useful. 
In the nearest future, I predict that I will haven't time for coding open sources :(
I see that we have a great community, that's love to support us.

@TomaszG,  may want you to create a PR with a fix? I will be thankful and review it ASAP (just mark me as "requested review").

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body:
Looks like we just need to add another condition here:
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/commit/020cb99547f23cdf7593b58ba94ba6ca145c4bac#diff-147b472da81752bafc2b02627836b12eR236

Happy to merge a PR that adds this with a browser test
